'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=WCp3bkGT4b2MCp4FGWa9_EP.cooZA9yQwo66PrxOIWE-1772560367-1.0.1.1-uMtYVNUbE..rND7HeTOHgdlnn0X_BTER6gIV_GE9GX4"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
